mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, role_id, real_name, grade_id, class_id) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{roleId}, #{realName}, #{gradeId}, #{classId})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET real_name=#{realName}, grade_id=#{gradeId}, class_id=#{classId}, points=#{points} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login=#{lastLogin} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash=#{passwordHash} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM users WHERE role_id=#{roleId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM users WHERE grade_id=#{gradeId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM users WHERE class_id=#{classId} ORDER BY id DESC
